description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade, allowing for ample natural light. The front entrance is centrally located, flanked by two symmetrical garden plots with blossoming trees and a paved walkway leading to the door. The rear of the house features an expansive patio area with outdoor dining furniture, several lounge chairs, and a rectangular swimming pool. The side and rear walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The exterior is finished in a clean white or light gray material, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is geometric and minimalist, with clear, straight lines and a focus on open outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, a central entryway, and a spacious backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, central door, two garden plots with blossoming trees, and a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid wall, partial view of the patio, outdoor dining area, and pool in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the expansive patio, outdoor dining set, lounge chairs, and rectangular swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid wall, partial patio, and a clear look at the front garden and walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, paved walkway, and flanked by landscaped garden plots with blossoming trees
